short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $22.22B in FY2026 Q1, +14.0% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $21.20B (-4.6% vs current Q) — set by 24 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $0.45.
Next earnings: 2026-07-29 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is mixed — execution risk on the next guide is elevated.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $149B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $86B → FY2 $98B (+14.0% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 15.0% — average operating profile over the long-cycle view.
6-quarter run-rate CAGR: -27.9% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Industrials): Reshoring + defense supercycle drives a multi-year backlog conversion story.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if the next 2–4 quarters confirm a stabilization in trajectory.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 65.3% — elevated (premium-selling favored).
Put/Call OI: 0.66 — call-heavy positioning (consensus bullish).
30-day implied move: ±8.3% ($199.91 – $236.15) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: -3.56pp — call skew (upside bid — bullish positioning).
Front-month OI cluster: $250.0 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Sell 30–45 DTE call vertical: short $229 / long $240 (5% OTM short, 10% OTM long). High IV in downtrend → bearish credit spread with defined risk.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 36.9% across 8 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 8 dates spanning 98–616 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±18.6% ($177.54 – $258.52).
398-day implied move: ±40.8% ($129.11 – $306.95) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $245 (+12.4% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Term structure in backwardation (-28.4pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Long 6-month put at $218 strike (ATM). High IV (65%) is expensive but downtrend justifies hedging; protects portfolio if cycle deteriorates further. Roll quarterly to maintain protection.
